name: Chinese New Year Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the Chinese dried mushrooms for 2 hours and cut them into julienne strips.
2. Soak the Napa cabbage in water for one hour (optional).
3. Soak the dried lily buds for one hour (optional).
4. Soak the dried bean curd skin for one hour (optional).
5. Cut the bamboo shoots into julienne strips and slice them.
6. Mix the ingredients for the Foo yee sauce: 2 tbsp, light soy sauce, 1/8 tsp sugar, 2 tbsp sesame oil, 1/2 tsp ground white pepper, and garlic & red chile paste or more to taste.
7. Soak cellophane noodles (sai fun) for one hour.
8. Use 2 cups of chicken stock.
9. Chop green onions.
- Have everything ready before you light the wok. Prepare and soak the vegetables, mix the sauce, and then proceed.
- Heat the wok and add the oil, salt, garlic, and ginger.
- Cook for a moment and then add the vegetables.
- Cook until hot and tender and then add the Foo yee sauce, drained noodles, and chicken stock to the wok.
- Stir and simmer uncovered until the noodles are clear and tender and have absorbed most of the broth. Taste and adjust salt if needed. Place in a serving bowl. Garnish with green onions and serve.
